name: Mixed Provider Jury
description: Most jurors inherit OpenAI via llm_provider; one juror fully overrides to native Anthropic. Requires: pip install openjury[anthropic]

jurors.name: GPT Evaluator
jurors.system_prompt: Evaluate for factual accuracy and completeness.

jurors.name: GPT User Lens
jurors.system_prompt: Evaluate from the perspective of a non-technical user.

jurors.name: Claude Evaluator
jurors.system_prompt: You are an independent second opinion. Be rigorous about reasoning quality.

criteria.name: helpfulness
criteria.description: Does the response resolve the user's request?

criteria.name: reasoning
criteria.description: Is the reasoning sound and well-structured?
